theme: 那些火影忍者精美绝伦的二创漫画：视觉与故事兼备

items.title: 木叶黎明与第七班背影
items.description: 清晨的木叶大门外，鸣人、佐助、小樱与卡卡西在逆光里准备出发，背影与装备细节交代出少年漫画真正开篇前的那股命运感。
items.prompt: stunning fanmade manga illustration inspired by Naruto, cinematic dawn at the Leaf Village gate, Team 7 seen from behind preparing for departure, Naruto orange-black jacket details, Sasuke dark outfit and sword silhouette, Sakura pink hair and gloves, Kakashi flak vest and forehead protector, warm sunrise, wind moving headbands and scroll straps, layered storytelling composition, highly polished comic art, emotional and epic but intimate, rich detail in sandals pouches kunai bags fabric folds village gate wood and dust, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 一乐拉面馆的傍晚笑声
items.description: 热气腾腾的拉面、吧台上的筷筒、零钱盘和少年们夸张的笑脸，让忍者世界的温暖日常与冒险间隙真正落到生活细部上。
items.prompt: beautiful fanmade Naruto comic scene, evening inside Ichiraku ramen shop after a mission, Naruto laughing with a huge bowl of ramen, Iruka smiling nearby, warm lantern light, chopsticks holder, condiment jars, coins tray, steaming bowls, wooden counter, small scratches and stains that show lived-in daily life, expressive faces and strong storytelling, polished manga-meets-anime illustration, cozy emotional atmosphere, vivid detail in noodles broth ceramic bowls aprons wood grain and steam, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 雨后的铃铛测试训练场
items.description: 湿润草地、散落苦无、挂在腰间的铃铛和被泥点溅脏的护额，让经典训练场景有了更强的临场故事感。
items.prompt: high-end fanmade Naruto manga splash page, rainy training ground after the bell test, wet grass, muddy tree roots, fallen kunai, two small bells hanging from Kakashi's waist, Naruto Sasuke Sakura in tense positions, droplets on forehead protectors, cinematic perspective, dynamic composition that implies movement and rivalry, exquisite detail on bandages pouches sandals wet fabric bark and metallic reflections, emotional storytelling, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 白雾大桥上的羽毛与冰镜
items.description: 再不斩篇的桥上迷雾、飘落白羽与冰镜碎片形成极强视觉符号，把少年第一次真正面对死亡重量的故事感压进一张图里。
items.prompt: masterpiece fanmade Naruto comic artwork, dramatic bridge in thick mist inspired by Land of Waves arc, Haku's shattered ice mirrors and white feathers drifting through air, Naruto and Sasuke wounded but defiant, cold blue-gray palette, Zabuza silhouette emerging in fog, emotional tragedy and resolve, cinematic panel composition with foreground shards and distant bridge lines, hyper-detailed water droplets metal tools bandages sandals and fog depth, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 死亡森林卷轴争夺
items.description: 卷轴、陷阱钢丝、树皮刻痕和紧绷的姿态一起构成中忍考试最令人窒息的狩猎感，视觉上像一页密度极高的战术漫画。
items.prompt: gorgeous fanmade Naruto action comic illustration, Forest of Death during the Chunin Exam, scroll fight among giant roots and branches, taut wire traps, scratched bark, hidden tags, Team 7 in ambush motion, Orochimaru-like menace hinted in background without text, layered predator-prey tension, dramatic green shadows and sharp highlights, extremely detailed ninja tools pouches scroll cords leaves mud and bark textures, story-rich composition, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 日向对决后的裂地与掌印
items.description: 宁次与雏田对决后，地面裂纹、散落发带与衣角上的掌击痕迹，比正面出招更能讲出天才与命运的残酷。
items.prompt: emotional fanmade Naruto tournament manga art, aftermath of Hyuga duel in the exam arena, cracked stone floor, gentle fist impact marks, Hinata's damaged sleeve and ribbon on the ground, Neji standing with cold restraint, spectators blurred high above, tragic destiny-heavy atmosphere, refined monochrome-plus-soft-color comic style, obsessive detail on stone dust torn cloth sandals and arena shadows, strong storytelling without dialogue, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 月光下我爱罗的砂之守护
items.description: 瓷罐裂纹、砂粒轨迹和冷月下的孤独站姿，把我爱罗既危险又可怜的角色气质完整压缩进单幅叙事。
items.prompt: stunning fanmade Naruto character-story illustration, Gaara under moonlight with swirling sand shield, cracked gourd texture visible, lonely posture on rooftop edge, cold desert-like wind meeting village architecture, moonlit blue palette with muted red accents, tragic isolation and hidden violence, polished manga cover quality, intricate detail in sand grains cloth straps rooftop tiles and facial expression, strong narrative mood, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 火影楼屋顶上的最后守护
items.description: 老旧瓦片、飞起的符纸、猿飞袍摆与大蛇丸阴影交叠，让这张图既有大战感，也有一位老人独自扛住时代的悲壮。
items.prompt: epic fanmade Naruto comic battle tableau, Hokage roof confrontation at stormy dusk, Third Hokage facing Orochimaru, fluttering paper seals, broken roof tiles, robe movement, giant barrier implied in distance, purple-gray storm sky, emotional sense of an old protector making a final stand, manga masterpiece composition with cinematic scale and fine detail in tiles smoke cloth hands and weapon glints, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 终结之谷暴雨对峙
items.description: 巨像、瀑布、暴雨与少年决裂的表情，让火影最具宿命感的一战天然拥有展览级的大画面戏剧张力。
items.prompt: legendary fanmade Naruto comic masterpiece, Valley of the End in heavy rain, Naruto and Sasuke facing each other atop giant statues with waterfall crashing behind, lightning cutting the sky, ripped sleeves, wet hair, fierce emotion, monumental environment plus intimate expression, dynamic manga splash composition, highly detailed stone erosion rainwater chakra-like energy restrained not flashy, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 晓组织据点里的赤云静默
items.description: 昏暗石窟内，黑底红云长袍、戒指、指甲油、斗笠水痕与冷光桌面共同营造出危险组织特有的美学秩序。
items.prompt: luxurious dark fanmade Naruto comic illustration, Akatsuki hideout interior, red-cloud cloaks hanging and partly worn, rings on fingers, rain-stained straw hats, low stone table, cold lamp glow, silent villain meeting atmosphere, elegant menace instead of action, editorial-grade composition with rich blacks and crimson accents, meticulous detail in cloak fabric nails rings stone surface candle wax and shadows, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 雨隐村前的最后回望
items.description: 自来也在雨中回望的瞬间，把豪迈与宿命都压低成一种安静的成熟悲剧，适合做整组中段最刺痛的一页。
items.prompt: heartbreaking fanmade Naruto comic art, Jiraiya entering the Rain Village under endless rain, turning back for one last look, cloak soaked, wooden geta splashing through shallow water, pipes and industrial village silhouettes beyond, melancholy heroism, cinematic framing with foreground rain streaks and distant glow, refined detail in raindrops wrinkles travel pack sandals and wet stone, emotionally devastating storytelling, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 鼬与乌鸦的长廊微光
items.description: 长廊灯笼的暗红、乌鸦羽毛与鼬回头的表情，形成一种极克制的美感，像整组里最适合停下来看第二遍的一幅。
items.prompt: exquisite fanmade Naruto manga portrait-scene, Itachi in a dim corridor with crows taking flight around him, faint red lantern glow, subtle wind lifting cloak edge, sorrow hidden behind calm expression, polished dark poetic composition, highly controlled palette of black red and amber, layered feathers and corridor depth for strong visual storytelling, obsessive detail on eyes cloak folds crow feathers wood floor and light falloff, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 佩恩袭村后的寂静中心
items.description: 废墟中心的静止一秒比爆炸本身更震撼，残瓦、断梁、灰尘与站立的人影共同构成末日级叙事张力。
items.prompt: spectacular fanmade Naruto disaster comic illustration, aftermath of Pain's assault on the Leaf Village, vast crater and shattered buildings, one central figure standing in eerie silence, dust drifting in sunlight shafts, broken beams, torn banners without readable text, emotional scale of catastrophe and loneliness, masterpiece manga spread, immense environmental detail in rubble stone wood smoke and clothing edges, no logos

items.title: 雪夜围巾与未说出口的话
items.description: 把热血主线之外最打动人的柔软感放进雪夜一幕：围巾针脚、指尖犹豫、灯火远景，让故事节奏在这里忽然变轻。
items.prompt: tender fanmade Naruto romantic comic artwork, snowy evening scene with Naruto and Hinata sharing a quiet moment, handmade scarf details, hesitant fingertips, soft village lights in the distance, gentle breath in cold air, emotional warmth after long hardship, elegant manga illustration with cinematic snow depth, fine detail in knit texture blush expressions coats gloves boots and snowflakes, no readable text, no logos

items.title: 黄昏火影办公室的圆满回环
items.description: 把整组收在成年鸣人的办公室黄昏里：斗篷、卷轴、全家福式暖意与窗外木叶余晖，让故事最终落回“成长完成”的满足感。
items.prompt: grand finale fanmade Naruto comic illustration, sunset inside the Hokage office with adult Naruto, white cloak draped over chair, stacked scrolls, family warmth subtly implied, village rooftops glowing outside the window, heroic maturity replacing childhood chaos, golden-orange evening palette, emotionally satisfying end-of-journey atmosphere, exhibition-quality storytelling composition with rich detail in desk wood scroll ties cloak fabric window light and framed memories without readable text, no logos
